ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence record */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The actual DNA sequence string */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences of this sequence in the dataset */,
  "p_value" REAL /* Statistical p-value associated with the sequence */,
  "obs_exp_max" REAL /* Maximum observed to expected ratio for the sequence */,
  "max_obs_exp_position" INTEGER /* Position of the maximum observed to expected ratio */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., DNA, RNA, Protein) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the sequence is derived */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sequence data (e.g., lab, public database) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sequence */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Additional annotations or notes about the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical comparison, variant detection) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., BLAST, Bowtie) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., biologist, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the researcher belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sequences" (
  "project_sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-sequence association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project involving the sequence */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence linked to the project */,
  "sequence_version" TEXT /* Version of the sequence used in the project */,
  "sequence_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the sequence in the context of the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sequence in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sequences_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sequences_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the sequence */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
